evidences.title: Elon Musk # of tweets Mar 14-21? - Polymarket Analytics
evidences.content: # Elon Musk # of tweets Mar 14-21? This market will resolve according to the number of times Elon Musk (@elonmusk), posts on X between March 14, 2025, 12:00 PM ET and March 21, 2025, 12:00 PM ET. For the purposes of this market, only main feed posts, quote posts and reposts posts will count. Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as will be counted by the tracker. Deleted posts will count as long as they remain available long enough to be captured by the tracker (~5 minutes). The resolution source for this market is the ‘Post Counter’ figure for posts found at Individual posts can be viewed by clicking "Export Data". If the tracker does not update correctly in accordance with the rules, X itself may be used as a secondary resolution source. [...] Logo # Elon Musk # of tweets Mar 14-21? evidences.title: Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on ... - Facebook
evidences.content: ## The Hodgetwins's Post ### The Hodgetwins November 20, 2025 · Elon Musk thanked President Donald Trump in a post on X (formerly Twitter) on November 19, 2025, saying, "I would like to thank Donald Trump for all he has done for America and the world." This came shortly after Trump made a comment at a U.S.–Saudi investment forum asking, “Has he ever thanked me properly?” while referencing Musk. Musk's message appears to signal a shift toward a more cordial relationship with Trump, following months of tension and public disputes between the two. The interaction between Musk and Trump follows a period of high-profile feuding, including Trump’s public remarks and Musk's comments on the state of their relationship.
